---
title: "Industry Experience | Chuan (River) Zhu"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "Research-relevant industry collaboration and internship experience by Chuan (River) Zhu in AI-enabled service operations, platform operations, and operational problem diagnosis."
author: "Chuan (River) Zhu"
keywords:
  - industry collaboration
  - AI-enabled service operations
  - platform operations
  - Alibaba customer operations
  - service operations
  - empirical operations management
---

::: {.home-page}

::: {.content-band}
<div class="eyebrow">Industry Experience</div>

# Industry Experience

My industry experience supports my empirical research in AI-enabled service operations, platform operations, and operational decision-making. I use this page to document research-relevant collaboration and field-facing experience while keeping confidential details out of the public website.

::: {.hero-links}
[Alibaba Group](#alibaba-group){.link-button}
[EDF Climate Corps & LONGi](#environmental-defense-fund-climate-corps-and-longi-green-energy){.link-button}
[Research](research.qmd){.link-button}
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Experience

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper-entry}
### Alibaba Group

<div class="paper-meta">Customer Operations Department | Research Scientist | Full-time, Onsite, Academic Collaboration | Hangzhou, China | July 2022 - Present</div>

- Collaborate on human-AI hybrid customer service system design.
- Develop algorithms with causal inference to better manage worker supply.
- Design data-driven strategies to optimize customer service operations.
- Provide academic consulting to support Alibaba's operational innovation initiatives.

**Research relevance:** This collaboration supports my research on AI-enabled customer service operations, human-AI collaboration, workforce management, and platform operations.

TODO: Add preferred confidentiality wording for public descriptions of the Alibaba collaboration.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Environmental Defense Fund Climate Corps and LONGi Green Energy

<div class="paper-meta">Climate Corps Fellow | Full-time, Onsite, Internship | Xi'an, China | July 2021 - Oct. 2021</div>

- Analyzed supplier-side carbon-management challenges and green supply-chain opportunities.
- Designed supplier survey instruments and benchmarked leading firms' decarbonization practices.
- Developed a green supplier empowerment roadmap for training, renewable-energy adoption, monitoring, and incentives.

**Research relevance:** This experience is related to operational problem diagnosis, supplier-side analysis, benchmarking, and implementation-oriented sustainability work.

[LONGi green supply chain public project page](https://www.longi.com/cn/sustainability/green-supply-chain/)

TODO: Confirm whether this public project link should remain on the website.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Research Connection

These roles help ground my academic work in operational settings where technology, workers, customers, and organizations interact. The Alibaba collaboration is most directly connected to my current agenda on AI-enabled service operations and platform operations. The EDF Climate Corps and LONGi experience adds broader exposure to supplier-side operational analysis and sustainability-oriented process improvement.
:::

::: {.content-band .contact-band}
## Information To Complete

- TODO: Confirm final confidentiality language for industry collaborations.
- TODO: Confirm whether to include company logos or keep this page text-only.
- TODO: Confirm whether all public project links should be displayed.
- TODO: Add any additional verified industry collaborations, if applicable.
:::

:::
